message:
🐛 Add grace period when user toggles demo off without agent (#889)

When user manually toggles demo mode off and agent is disconnected, wait 8s
for agent to connect before re-enabling demo. The pill shows "connecting" then
"disconnected" during this window, giving visual feedback that a connection
attempt is happening. On initial page load, demo mode still enables immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
